_readme: Curated FACEIT competition registry (Roadmap Phase B1).
FACEIT is authoritative for match FACTS ONLY (teams, rosters, schedule,
series result, bracket) — never compositions. This registry tells the
discovery layer WHICH FACEIT championships count as official professional
OWCS, so we never rely on unrestricted text search over all of FACEIT on
every run (see B1). Only entries that are `enabled` AND carry a real
`championshipId` drive discovery.
Every enabled entry below was VERIFIED against the live FACEIT Data API
on `verificationDate` using the read-only candidate-discovery tooling
(cli.py list-championships / verify-competition, run inside the discovery
GitHub Actions workflow where the FACEIT_API_KEY secret lives). See
docs/AUTOMATION.md and docs/FACEIT-REGISTRY.md for the procedure.
COVERAGE FINDING (2026-07-24): the ONLY OWCS 2026 competitions exposed by
the FACEIT Data API for this key are the North America and EMEA Open
Qualifiers, run by the official 'FACEIT League - Overwatch' organizer
that feeds OWCS (Tier 2 per the roadmap). No 2026 main-stage regional
leagues, and no Korea/Japan/Pacific/China/Global OWCS championships, are
discoverable on FACEIT — those broadcasts are operated off-FACEIT. Those
regions therefore stay DISABLED with a null championshipId until a real
official id is confirmed; they are NOT guessed.

organizers.name: OWCS | Overwatch Champions Series
organizers.note: Official OWCS organizer on FACEIT (ran OWCS 2024 stages). No OWCS 2026 championships are exposed under this organizer via the Data API as of the verification date.

organizers.name: FACEIT League - Overwatch
organizers.note: Official FACEIT League feeder that runs the OWCS 2026 Open Qualifiers (Tier 2).

organizers.name: Overwatch Esports & PlayOverwatch
organizers.note: Blizzard official esports org on FACEIT. No public championships exposed via /organizers/{id}/championships as of the verification date.

competitions.name: OWCS 2026 OQ - NA
competitions.notes: Verified live via FACEIT Data API. Official OWCS 2026 North America Open Qualifier (status: finished). Dates not exposed by the API (null). Tier 2 (official qualifier feeding OWCS).

competitions.name: OWCS 2026 OQ - EMEA
competitions.notes: Verified live via FACEIT Data API. Official OWCS 2026 EMEA Open Qualifier (status: finished). Dates not exposed by the API (null). Tier 2 (official qualifier feeding OWCS).

competitions.name: OWCS 2026 — North America (main stage)
competitions.notes: No FACEIT championship found for the OWCS 2026 NA MAIN stage (only the Open Qualifier above is on FACEIT). Set a real championshipId and enable when confirmed — do not guess.

competitions.name: OWCS 2026 — EMEA (main stage)
competitions.notes: No FACEIT championship found for the OWCS 2026 EMEA MAIN stage. Set a real championshipId and enable when confirmed — do not guess.

competitions.name: OWCS 2026 — Korea / Asia
competitions.notes: No OWCS Korea/Asia championship is discoverable on FACEIT (operated off-FACEIT). Disabled until an official id is confirmed — do not guess.

competitions.name: OWCS 2026 — Japan
competitions.notes: No OWCS Japan championship is discoverable on FACEIT (operated off-FACEIT). Disabled until an official id is confirmed — do not guess.

competitions.name: OWCS 2026 — Pacific
competitions.notes: No OWCS Pacific championship is discoverable on FACEIT (operated off-FACEIT). Disabled until an official id is confirmed — do not guess.

competitions.name: OWCS 2026 — China
competitions.notes: No OWCS China championship is discoverable on FACEIT (operated off-FACEIT, likely a different platform). Disabled until an official id is confirmed — do not guess.

competitions.name: OWCS 2026 — Global Live Event
competitions.notes: No OWCS 2026 Global live-event championship is discoverable on FACEIT. Highest backfill priority (Phase D5) once an official id is confirmed — do not guess.
